summary: Spec review approved for GH-104 implementation head c3e7b00887310ce5047c12a28ac67011208b500c. The formal spec is a minimal suite for Core-only Harbor public runtime/evidence refs binding and explicitly excludes result envelopes, API query/App integration, Harbor SDK/runtime calls, raw evidence bodies, and true writes.
reviewed_validation_summary: Pre-PR GH-104 validation passed on 2026-07-02 local time: `pnpm --filter @webenvoy/core-runtime typecheck`, `pnpm --filter @webenvoy/core-runtime test`, `pnpm --filter @webenvoy/schemas test`, `pnpm conformance`, `pnpm build`, `pnpm typecheck`, `pnpm lint`, `pnpm test`, `git diff --check`, `jq empty .loom/specs/GH-104/build-evidence.json .loom/bootstrap/init-result.json`, `loom doctor --target . --json`, `loom verify --target . --json`, `loom fact-chain --target . --json`, `loom suite validate --target . --item GH-104 --json`, `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item GH-104 --json`, `loom suite evidence validate --target . --item GH-104 --json`, and packaged source-runtime `loom_flow.py flow build --target . --item GH-104`. Installed `loom build --target . --item GH-104 --build-evidence .loom/specs/GH-104/build-evidence.json --json` was classified as a non-code tooling block because it could not consume suite CLI JSON from the installed v0.25.0 surface; the packaged source-runtime build flow passed. Review-readiness source-distribution tools are not applicable to this consumer repo because there is no `tools/` directory and `tools/skills_surface.py check`, `tools/loom_check.py --profile source --source-surface contract-only`, `tools/check_release_surface.py`, `tools/version_surface_check.py`, and `tools/check_npm_package.py` are absent. PR metadata readback passed for PR #125 at head `9b71543c6459f646b642d5b5d80e4bfc440741c3`; hosted checks, merge, and issue closeout remain pending.
